mapper.insert: INSERT INTO merge_task ( task_id, owner_type, owner_id, status, file_count, total_size_bytes, merge_progress_index, merge_progress_done, merge_progress_name, result_file_path, result_file_name, result_size_bytes, error_code, error_message, retry_count, version, created_at, updated_at, expired_at ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{ownerType}, #{ownerId}, #{status}, #{fileCount}, #{totalSizeBytes}, #{mergeProgressIndex}, #{mergeProgressDone}, #{mergeProgressName}, #{resultFilePath}, #{resultFileName}, #{resultSizeBytes}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{retryCount}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{expiredAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE merge_task SET owner_type = #{ownerType}, owner_id = #{ownerId}, status = #{status}, file_count = #{fileCount}, total_size_bytes = #{totalSizeBytes}, merge_progress_index = #{mergeProgressIndex}, merge_progress_done = #{mergeProgressDone}, merge_progress_name = #{mergeProgressName}, result_file_path = #{resultFilePath}, result_file_name = #{resultFileName}, result_size_bytes = #{resultSizeBytes}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, version = #{version}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, expired_at = #{expiredAt} WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM merge_task WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND owner_id = #{ownerId}
